NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMNT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER 123 LUMPSUM LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER 123 LUMPSUM LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COURT HAS RECEIVED COURTESY COPY OF MOVING PAPERS FROM PETITIONER. PETITIONER TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - PETITIONER 123 LUMPSUM LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A FURTHER DOCUMENTATION ON THE PRIOR TRANSFER SPECIFICALLY WHAT ANNUITY PAYMENTS WERE CONTEMPLATED BY THE PRIOR TRANSFER. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LESLIE NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/LN

calendar.matters:
Petitioner 123 Lumpsum Llc'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN Z. SHAFAI, TEL. NO. (310) 788-2889 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Petitioner 123 Lumpsum LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is granted. Petitioner's counsel provided the court with a further documentation on the prior transfer specifically what annuity payments were contemplated by the prior transfer. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/LN

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN SHAFAI, ESQ., 310.788.2889, FOR PETITIONER STRUCTURED ASSET FUNDING, LLC.
RAJHEEM CARRIE, RESPONDENT IN PRO PER.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. The Court VACATED its tentative ruling. PETITIONER 123 LUMPSUM LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COURT HAS RECEIVED COURTESY COPY OF MOVING PAPERS FROM PETITIONER. PETITIONER TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
